reference: My eight-month-old baby has a fever of thirty-seven point nine degrees Celsius. I checked her temperature using a baby thermometer in the ear. She has a slight cough, but she plays as normal. I gave her Adol syrup a while back, and it has decreased. However, her body, including her forehead, is quite warm.
text: My eight-month-old baby has a fever of thirty-seven point nine degrees Celsius. I checked her temperature using a baby thermometer in the ear. She has a slight cough, but she plays normally. I gave her a dolce syrup, a lullaby, and it has decreased. However, her body, including the forehead, is quite warm.
